shaders.shaderCode: uniform vec2 u_resolution;uniform float u_time;void main(){gl_FragColor = vec4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);}

shaders.prompt: Flowing molten lava texture, fiery red and orange colors
A calm water surface with gentle ripples, blue and cyan tones
shaders.shaderCode: uniform vec2 u_resolution;uniform float u_time;void main(){vec2 uv = gl_FragCoord.xy / u_resolution; float t = u_time * 0.3; float r1 = sin(uv.x * 12.0 + uv.y * 8.0 + t * 1.5) * 0.5 + 0.5; float r2 = sin(uv.x * 7.0 - uv.y * 11.0 + t * 2.0) * 0.5 + 0.5; float r3 = sin((uv.x + uv.y) * 15.0 + t * 1.2) * 0.5 + 0.5; float ripple = (r1 + r2 + r3) / 3.0; float depth = 1.0 - uv.y * 0.6; vec3 col1 = vec3(0.02, 0.15, 0.25); vec3 col2 = vec3(0.1, 0.4, 0.6); vec3 col3 = vec3(0.2, 0.7, 0.9); vec3 col4 = vec3(0.5, 0.85, 1.0); vec3 col5 = vec3(0.8, 0.95, 1.0); float mix1 = smoothstep(0.0, 0.5, ripple) * depth; float mix2 = smoothstep(0.3, 0.7, ripple) * depth; float mix3 = smoothstep(0.5, 0.9, ripple) * depth; vec3 color = mix(col1, col2, mix1); color = mix(color, col3, mix2); color = mix(color, col4, mix3); color = mix(color, col5, sin(uv.x * 20.0 + uv.y * 15.0 + t * 0.8) * 0.5 + 0.5); float foam = sin(uv.x * 30.0 + uv.y * 20.0 + t * 2.5) * 0.5 + 0.5; foam = smoothstep(0.6, 0.9, foam) * 0.2 * (1.0 - uv.y); color += foam; float haze = exp(-uv.y * 3.0) * 0.15; color = mix(color, vec3(0.6, 0.8, 0.95), haze); gl_FragColor = vec4(color, 1.0);}

shaders.prompt: test colorful nebula in deep space
shaders.shaderCode: uniform vec2 u_resolution;uniform float u_time;void main(){vec2 uv = gl_FragCoord.xy / u_resolution; vec3 col = vec3(0.0); float t = u_time * 0.1; vec2 p = uv * 2.0 - 1.0; p.x *= u_resolution.x / u_resolution.y; float r = length(p); float a = atan(p.y, p.x); float n = sin(a * 5.0 + t * 2.0) * 0.5 + 0.5; n = mix(n, sin(a * 10.0 - t * 3.0) * 0.5 + 0.5, 0.3); n = mix(n, sin(a * 20.0 + t * 4.0 + r * 5.0) * 0.5 + 0.5, 0.2); float nebula = smoothstep(0.2, 0.8, n) * (1.0 - smoothstep(0.5, 1.5, r)); vec3 color1 = vec3(0.2, 0.0, 0.5); vec3 color2 = vec3(0.0, 0.3, 0.8); vec3 color3 = vec3(1.0, 0.1, 0.6); vec3 color4 = vec3(0.8, 0.0, 0.2); vec3 color5 = vec3(0.0, 0.0, 0.1); float grad = sin(a * 3.0 + t + r * 2.0) * 0.5 + 0.5; vec3 nebulaColor = mix(mix(mix(mix(color1, color2, grad), color3, grad * 0.7), color4, grad * 0.4), color5, grad * 0.2); col += nebula * nebulaColor * 1.5; float stars = pow(max(0.0, sin(uv.x * 500.0 + uv.y * 300.0 + t * 10.0) * sin(uv.y * 400.0 - uv.x * 600.0 + t * 15.0) * 0.5 + 0.5), 20.0); stars *= 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0, 0.8, r); col += stars * vec3(1.0, 0.9, 0.7) * 2.0; float glow = exp(-r * 3.0) * 0.3; col += glow * vec3(0.5, 0.2, 0.8); float vignette = 1.0 - r * 0.5; col *= vignette; vec3 finalColor = col; gl_FragColor = vec4(finalColor, 1.0);}

shaders.prompt: dramatic volcanic eruption with glowing lava flowing down a mountainside at night bright orange and red colors ash clouds illuminated by fire cinematic unreal engine 5 quality
shaders.shaderCode: uniform vec2 u_resolution;uniform float u_time;void main(){vec2 uv=gl_FragCoord.xy/u_resolution;uv.x*=u_resolution.x/u_resolution.y;vec2 uv2=uv*1.5+vec2(sin(u_time*0.05)*0.2,cos(u_time*0.03)*0.1);float n=fract(sin(dot(uv2,vec2(12.9898,78.233)))*43758.5453);float m=fract(sin(dot(uv2*2.5,vec2(49.913,13.127)))*39123.8472);float p=fract(sin(dot(uv2*1.8+u_time*0.02,vec2(67.312,29.509)))*52314.2913);float lava=0.0;for(int i=0;i<6;i++){vec2 off=vec2(float(i)*0.17+u_time*0.01,float(i)*0.23+u_time*0.008);vec2 pos=uv*0.6+off;float f=sin(pos.x*12.0+pos.y*8.0+u_time*0.5)*0.5+0.5;f*=sin(pos.x*7.0-pos.y*11.0+u_time*0.3)*0.5+0.5;f*=sin(pos.x*15.0+pos.y*9.0-u_time*0.4)*0.5+0.5;lava+=f*0.2*(1.0-abs(uv.y-0.3)*2.0);}float mountain=1.0-smoothstep(0.2,0.8,uv.y+sin(uv.x*8.0+u_time*0.1)*0.1+sin(uv.x*15.0+u_time*0.05)*0.05);float glow=exp(-abs(uv.y-0.2)*8.0)*0.3+exp(-abs(uv.y-0.1)*4.0)*0.2;float ash=n*0.2+m*0.15+p*0.1+sin(uv.x*30.0+uv.y*20.0+u_time*0.2)*0.1;ash*=smoothstep(0.7,0.9,uv.y+sin(uv.x*12.0+u_time*0.15)*0.08);vec3 col1=vec3(1.0,0.9,0.4);vec3 col2=vec3(1.0,0.5,0.1);vec3 col3=vec3(0.8,0.15,0.05);vec3 col4=vec3(0.3,0.05,0.02);vec3 col5=vec3(0.1,0.02,0.01);vec3 lavaCol=mix(col1,col2,smoothstep(0.0,0.5,lava));lavaCol=mix(lavaCol,col3,smoothstep(0.3,0.7,lava));lavaCol=mix(lavaCol,col4,smoothstep(0.6,0.9,lava));lavaCol=mix(lavaCol,col5,smoothstep(0.8,1.0,lava));lavaCol*=1.0+glow*0.5;vec3 ashCol=mix(vec3(0.6,0.4,0.2),vec3(0.2,0.1,0.05),ash);vec3 fireCol=mix(col2,col3,sin(uv.x*8.0+uv.y*12.0+u_time*0.3)*0.5+0.5);fireCol*=smoothstep(0.5,0.8,uv.y)*0.3;vec3 finalCol=mix(ashCol,lavaCol,mountain*0.8+glow*0.5);finalCol+=fireCol*(1.0-smoothstep(0.3,0.7,uv.y))*0.4;finalCol+=vec3(1.0,0.6,0.2)*glow*0.3;finalCol+=vec3(1.0,0.3,0.0)*pow(mountain*0.5+glow*0.3,3.0)*0.2;finalCol=mix(finalCol,vec3(0.1,0.02,0.0),smoothstep(0.0,0.3,uv.y)*0.5);finalCol=pow(finalCol,vec3(1.0/2.2));gl_FragColor=vec4(finalCol,1.0);}

shaders.prompt: deep underwater trench with bioluminescent deep sea creatures swimming through ancient ruins mysterious atmosphere
shaders.shaderCode: uniform vec2 u_resolution;uniform float u_time;void main(){vec2 uv=gl_FragCoord.xy/u_resolution;vec2 p=(uv*2.0-1.0)*vec2(u_resolution.x/u_resolution.y,1.0);float t=u_time*0.1;float depth=sin(p.y*3.0+t)*0.3+0.7;vec3 col=mix(vec3(0.01,0.005,0.03),vec3(0.05,0.1,0.15),smoothstep(-0.5,0.5,p.y));col=mix(col,vec3(0.02,0.03,0.05),smoothstep(0.3,0.8,sin(p.x*5.0+p.y*3.0+t)));float ruin=sin(p.x*12.0+t)*sin(p.y*8.0-t*0.5)*0.5+0.5;ruin=smoothstep(0.3,0.7,ruin);vec3 ruinCol=mix(vec3(0.1,0.08,0.05),vec3(0.2,0.15,0.1),sin(p.x*20.0+p.y*10.0+t));col=mix(col,ruinCol,ruin*0.4);float bio=0.0;for(int i=0;i<5;i++){float fi=float(i);vec2 pos=vec2(sin(fi*2.0+t*0.5+fi)*0.8,cos(fi*1.5+t*0.3+fi)*0.6);pos+=vec2(sin(t*0.2+fi)*0.1,cos(t*0.15+fi*2.0)*0.1);float d=length(p-pos);bio+=0.02/(d*d+0.01)*smoothstep(0.0,0.5,sin(t*2.0+fi*5.0)*0.5+0.5);}vec3 bioCol=mix(vec3(0.0,0.5,0.8),vec3(0.2,0.8,1.0),sin(t+uv.x*3.0)*0.5+0.5);bioCol=mix(bioCol,vec3(0.0,1.0,0.5),sin(t*1.5+uv.y*2.0)*0.5+0.5);col+=bio*bioCol*0.8;float glow=sin(p.x*8.0+t)*sin(p.y*6.0-t)*0.5+0.5;glow=smoothstep(0.4,0.6,glow);col+=glow*vec3(0.0,0.3,0.5)*0.15;float fog=1.0-smoothstep(0.0,1.5,length(p)*0.8);col=mix(col,vec3(0.01,0.02,0.04),fog*0.5);col+=vec3(0.0,0.02,0.04)*sin(p.x*20.0+t)*0.05;col=pow(col,vec3(1.0/2.2));gl_FragColor=vec4(col,1.0);}

shaders.prompt: sci-fi energy shield with flowing hexagon patterns pulsing with neon blue and electric purple light
Symmetrical kaleidoscope pattern, vibrant multi-color mandala with rotating geometric shapes
shaders.shaderCode: uniform vec2 u_resolution;uniform float u_time;void main(){vec2 uv=gl_FragCoord.xy/u_resolution;uv=(uv-.5)*2.;float t=u_time*.3;float a=atan(uv.y,uv.x)+t;float r=length(uv);float sides=8.;float ang=floor(a/(6.2832/sides))*(6.2832/sides);vec2 p=vec2(cos(ang),sin(ang));float d=abs(dot(uv,p));float layer1=sin(d*15.-t*3.)*.5+.5;float layer2=sin(r*20.+t*2.)*.5+.5;float layer3=sin((a+ang)*4.+t)*.5+.5;float pattern=mix(layer1,layer2,.5+sin(t)*.3);pattern=pattern*.7+layer3*.3;float wave=sin(r*12.-t*5.)*.5+.5;float glow=exp(-r*2.5)*.8;vec3 col1=vec3(.9,.2,.6);vec3 col2=vec3(.2,.8,.9);vec3 col3=vec3(1.,.9,.2);vec3 col4=vec3(.9,.3,.9);vec3 col5=vec3(.1,.9,.7);float c1=smoothstep(.0,.3,pattern);float c2=smoothstep(.3,.5,pattern);float c3=smoothstep(.5,.7,pattern);float c4=smoothstep(.7,.9,pattern);vec3 color=mix(col1,col2,c1);color=mix(color,col3,c2);color=mix(color,col4,c3);color=mix(color,col5,c4);color+=glow*vec3(.8,.4,.9);color+=wave*.15;color*=1.-smoothstep(.8,1.2,r);color+=pow(max(0.,1.-r*1.5),3.)*.4;gl_FragColor=vec4(color,1.);}

shaders.prompt: ethereal fantasy forest with glowing mushrooms and magical floating fireflies at twilight with bioluminescent plants and moonlight rays volumetric lighting cinematic unreal engine 5 quality
a breathtaking alien planet with bioluminescent crystal caves glowing neon purple and blue fog mysterious atmosphere X30969
shaders.shaderCode: uniform vec2 u_resolution;uniform float u_time;void main(){vec2 q=uv+vec2(sin(uv.y*12.0+t*1.2+uv.x*5.0)*0.08,cos(uv.x*10.0+t*0.9+uv.y*6.0)*0.08);float d=length(q-0.5);float cave=0.0;for(float i=0.0;i<6.0;i++){float f=2.0+pow(2.0,i);float a=sin(q.x*f*3.0+t*(0.3+i*0.15)+q.y*f*2.0)*cos(q.y*f*3.0+t*(0.2+i*0.12)-q.x*f*2.0);cave+=a/f;}cave=smoothstep(-0.5,0.6,cave);float crystal=0.0;for(float i=0.0;i<5.0;i++){float f=4.0+pow(1.8,i);vec2 r=q*2.0+vec2(t*0.05*i,sin(t*0.1+i)*0.3);float n=sin(r.x*f*2.0+t*0.7)*cos(r.y*f*2.0-t*0.5)+sin(r.y*f*1.5+t*0.3*i)*cos(r.x*f*1.5-t*0.4*i);crystal+=n/f;}crystal=smoothstep(-0.3,0.8,crystal);float fog=exp(-d*3.0)*0.8+0.2*sin(uv.y*20.0+t*0.5+uv.x*15.0)*0.15;float glow=exp(-d*8.0)*0.9+exp(-d*20.0)*0.5;vec3 col1=vec3(0.05,0.0,0.15);vec3 col2=vec3(0.1,0.0,0.5);vec3 col3=vec3(0.0,0.2,0.8);vec3 col4=vec3(0.8,0.1,1.0);vec3 col5=vec3(0.0,0.8,1.0);vec3 col6=vec3(0.9,0.2,0.6);float m1=smoothstep(0.2,0.6,cave);float m2=smoothstep(0.3,0.7,crystal);float m3=smoothstep(0.4,0.9,fog);vec3 base=mix(col1,col2,m1);base=mix(base,col3,m2*0.6);base=mix(base,col4,m3*0.5);float crystalGlow=exp(-abs(crystal-0.5)*12.0)*0.8*sin(t*2.0+uv.x*30.0)*0.5+0.5;base+=vec3(0.6,0.1,1.0)*crystalGlow*0.4;float caveGlow=exp(-abs(cave-0.4)*15.0)*0.6*cos(t*1.5+uv.y*25.0)*0.3+0.3;base+=vec3(0.2,0.0,0.8)*caveGlow*0.3;float ring=sin(length(q-0.5)*40.0-t*2.0)*0.5+0.5;ring=smoothstep(0.4,0.8,ring);base=mix(base,vec3(0.0,0.5,1.0),ring*0.15*glow);float ray=sin(atan(uv.x-0.5,uv.y-0.5)*8.0+t*0.7)*0.5+0.5;ray=smoothstep(0.3,0.7,ray);base=mix(base,vec3(0.8,0.2,1.0),ray*0.1*glow);float stars=0.0;for(float i=0.0;i<8.0;i++){vec2 p=vec2(fract(sin(i*123.456+uv.x*100.0))*2.0-1.0,fract(cos(i*789.012+uv.y*100.0))*2.0-1.0);stars+=exp(-length(p)*30.0)*0.3;}base+=vec3(1.0,0.8,1.0)*stars*0.3;float vignette=1.0-length(uv-0.5)*0.7;float scanlines=sin(uv.y*u_resolution.y*3.14159)*0.5+0.5;base*=mix(1.0,0.9,scanlines*0.08);base*=vignette;float grain=fract(sin(dot(gl_FragCoord.xy+mod(t*100.0,1000.0),vec2(12.9898,78.233)))*43758.5453);base+=vec3(grain)*0.02;vec3 finalColor=mix(base,vec3(0.9,0.3,1.0),glow*0.3);finalColor+=vec3(0.0,0.3,1.0)*exp(-d*12.0)*0.4;finalColor+=vec3(0.8,0.1,1.0)*exp(-d*25.0)*0.3;gl_FragColor=vec4(finalColor,1.0);}

shaders.prompt: beautiful colorful aurora borealis dancing night sky green purple blue cinematic quality
shaders.shaderCode: uniform vec2 u_resolution;uniform float u_time;void main(){vec2 uv=gl_FragCoord.xy/u_resolution;uv.y*=1.5;float t=u_time;vec3 col=vec3(0.02,0.01,0.05);for(int i=0;i<4;i++){float fi=float(i);vec2 p=uv+vec2(sin(t*0.2+fi*1.5+uv.y*3.0)*0.3,0.0);float band=abs(p.y-0.2-fi*0.15);band=smoothstep(0.08,0.0,band);float wave=sin(p.x*8.0+t*0.8+fi*2.0+uv.y*2.0)*0.5+0.5;band*=wave;vec3 aurora=mix(vec3(0.1,0.8,0.3),vec3(0.2,0.3,0.9),fi*0.3);aurora=mix(aurora,vec3(0.9,0.1,0.8),sin(fi+0.5+t*0.1)*0.5+0.5);col+=band*aurora*0.8;}float stars=step(0.99,sin(uv.x*500.0+uv.y*700.0+t*0.01)*0.5+0.5);stars*=step(0.5,sin(uv.x*300.0-uv.y*400.0+t*0.02)*0.5+0.5);col+=stars*vec3(0.8,0.9,1.0)*0.5;float glow=exp(-abs(uv.y-0.3)*8.0)*0.3;col+=glow*mix(vec3(0.1,0.8,0.5),vec3(0.5,0.2,0.9),sin(t*0.1)*0.5+0.5);col*=1.0-length(uv-0.5)*0.3;col=pow(col,vec3(0.9));gl_FragColor=vec4(col,1.0);}

shaders.prompt: cosmic nebula swirling with vibrant magenta cyan purple orange colors deep space stars volumetric glow cinematic quality unreal engine
shaders.shaderCode: uniform float u_time;uniform vec2 u_resolution;void main(){vec2 uv=(gl_FragCoord.xy/u_resolution-0.5)*1.5;float t=u_time*0.2;float a=atan(uv.y,uv.x)+t*0.3;float r=length(uv);float nebula=0.0;for(int i=0;i<5;i++){float fi=float(i);vec2 p=uv+vec2(sin(t*0.5+fi*1.3)*0.3,cos(t*0.4+fi*2.1)*0.3);float d=length(p);float density=0.08/(d+0.02);nebula+=density*(0.5+0.5*sin(fi*2.0+t*0.3+fi*1.5));}vec3 col1=vec3(0.6,0.1,0.8);vec3 col2=vec3(0.1,0.3,0.9);vec3 col3=vec3(0.0,0.8,0.6);vec3 col4=vec3(0.9,0.2,0.4);vec3 color=mix(col1,col2,sin(t*0.2+uv.x*2.0)*0.5+0.5);color=mix(color,col3,sin(t*0.15+uv.y*2.0)*0.4);color=mix(color,col4,sin(r*3.0-t)*0.3);float swirl=cos(a*4.0+r*8.0-t)*0.5+0.5;color=mix(color,vec3(0.8,0.9,1.0),swirl*0.15);color*=nebula*0.3+0.4;float halo=exp(-r*3.0)*0.7;color+=mix(col1,col2,sin(t*0.1)*0.5+0.5)*halo*0.4;float stars=step(0.998,sin(uv.x*600.0+t*10.0)*sin(uv.y*500.0+t*8.0)*cos(t*0.3));color+=stars*1.5;float brightStar=step(0.9998,sin((uv.x+0.3)*800.0)*sin((uv.y-0.2)*700.0)*sin(t*0.05));color+=brightStar*2.5;color*=1.0-r*0.15;gl_FragColor=vec4(color,1.0);}

shaders.prompt: cosmic nebula swirling vibrant magenta cyan purple deep space stars volumetric glow cinematic quality
shaders.shaderCode: uniform float u_time;uniform vec2 u_resolution;void main(){vec2 uv=(gl_FragCoord.xy/u_resolution-0.5)*1.5;float t=u_time*0.2;float a=atan(uv.y,uv.x)+t*0.3;float r=length(uv);float nebula=0.0;for(int i=0;i<5;i++){float fi=float(i);vec2 p=uv+vec2(sin(t*0.5+fi*1.3)*0.3,cos(t*0.4+fi*2.1)*0.3);float d=length(p);float density=0.08/(d+0.02);nebula+=density*(0.5+0.5*sin(fi*2.0+t*0.3+fi*1.5));}vec3 col1=vec3(0.6,0.1,0.8);vec3 col2=vec3(0.1,0.3,0.9);vec3 col3=vec3(0.0,0.8,0.6);vec3 col4=vec3(0.9,0.2,0.4);vec3 color=mix(col1,col2,sin(t*0.2+uv.x*2.0)*0.5+0.5);color=mix(color,col3,sin(t*0.15+uv.y*2.0)*0.4);color=mix(color,col4,sin(r*3.0-t)*0.3);float swirl=cos(a*4.0+r*8.0-t)*0.5+0.5;color=mix(color,vec3(0.8,0.9,1.0),swirl*0.15);color*=nebula*0.3+0.4;float halo=exp(-r*3.0)*0.7;color+=mix(col1,col2,sin(t*0.1)*0.5+0.5)*halo*0.4;float stars=step(0.998,sin(uv.x*600.0+t*10.0)*sin(uv.y*500.0+t*8.0)*cos(t*0.3));color+=stars*1.5;float brightStar=step(0.9998,sin((uv.x+0.3)*800.0)*sin((uv.y-0.2)*700.0)*sin(t*0.05));color+=brightStar*2.5;color*=1.0-r*0.15;gl_FragColor=vec4(color,1.0);}
